findings.title: User Behavior Tracking Pipeline
findings.description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures detailed user behavior metrics including browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user.
assumptions: Users will engage more with personalized content if their behavior is accurately tracked.

evidence.excerpt: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user.

recommendations: Ensure the pipeline can handle at least 50k events/second at peak.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN their behavior metrics are captured in real-time.

findings.title: ML Recommendation Engine
findings.description: Build a recommendation engine that utilizes user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions, incorporating collaborative filtering and content-based approaches.
assumptions: Personalized recommendations will improve user engagement.

evidence.excerpt: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions.

recommendations: Aim for a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine processes this data THEN it provides personalized content suggestions.

findings.title: User Preference Dashboard
findings.description: Create a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, inferred interests, and engagement patterns, allowing users to opt out of specific tracking categories.
assumptions: Users will appreciate transparency in data collection.

evidence.excerpt: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays what behavioral data we have collected about them.

recommendations: Include toggles for users to opt out of specific tracking categories.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they can see their inferred interests and opt out of tracking.

findings.title: Cross-Device Tracking Implementation
findings.description: Implement cross-device tracking to link user activity across mobile and web sessions, ensuring a unified user profile.
assumptions: Users will benefit from a seamless experience across devices.

evidence.excerpt: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching.

recommendations: Ensure compliance with privacy expectations regarding personal devices.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user logs in on multiple devices WHEN they interact with content THEN their activity is linked in their profile.

findings.title: Data Export for Advertisers
findings.description: Create an API and batch export system to share anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.
assumptions: Advertisers need access to user segments for targeted campaigns.

evidence.excerpt: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners.

recommendations: Validate the anonymization pipeline to prevent re-identification risks.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user segments are ready WHEN the export system is triggered THEN anonymized data is shared with advertisers.

findings.title: GDPR Compliance Audit Preparation
findings.description: Prepare for a full GDPR compliance audit by addressing key concerns such as lawful data processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
assumptions: Compliance is essential for market launch in the EU.

evidence.excerpt: Legal team has flagged that the PersonaLens profiling system requires a full GDPR compliance audit before launch.

recommendations: Complete a data protection impact assessment (DPIA) as part of the audit.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the compliance audit is initiated WHEN the necessary documentation is prepared THEN all key concerns are addressed.

findings.title: Granular Consent Mechanisms
findings.description: Develop granular consent options for users to manage their data tracking preferences, particularly for cross-device tracking and data sharing.
assumptions: Users need control over their data to feel secure.

evidence.excerpt: Users require more granular consent options for data tracking.

recommendations: Implement clear opt-out options for tracking on personal devices.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses consent settings WHEN they adjust their preferences THEN their choices are saved and respected.

findings.title: User Engagement Metrics Monitoring
findings.description: Establish monitoring and alerting for user engagement metrics to ensure the recommendation engine is performing effectively.
assumptions: Monitoring will help identify issues with user engagement.

evidence.excerpt: The User Engagement Score reflects the overall engagement level of users with the platform.

recommendations: Set up alerts for significant drops in engagement scores.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user engagement metrics are tracked WHEN a significant drop occurs THEN an alert is triggered.

findings.title: A/B Testing for Recommendation Engine
findings.description: Conduct A/B testing on different recommendation algorithms to measure their impact on Content CTR and user engagement.
assumptions: A/B testing will provide insights into the best-performing algorithms.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct A/B testing on different recommendation algorithms to measure their impact on Content CTR.

recommendations: Analyze results to optimize the recommendation engine.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different recommendation algorithms are tested WHEN A/B tests are conducted THEN the impact on Content CTR is measured.
metadata.story_title: Implement A/B testing for recommendation engine

findings.title: User Feedback Collection
findings.description: Implement a system for collecting user feedback on content recommendations to continuously improve the recommendation engine.
assumptions: User feedback is essential for refining recommendations.

evidence.excerpt: Users express a strong preference for personalized content recommendations.

recommendations: Create a feedback loop to gather insights from users.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user interacts with recommendations WHEN they provide feedback THEN their input is recorded for analysis.

summary: The analysis has led to the creation of a comprehensive backlog of requirements for the PersonaLens User Profiling product. Key areas of focus include user behavior tracking, personalized content recommendations, GDPR compliance, and user engagement monitoring. Each requirement is structured with clear acceptance criteria, priorities, and dependencies to ensure a well-organized development process.
